# Instructions

- Following Playwright test failed.
- Explain why, be concise, respect Playwright best practices.
- Provide a snippet of code with the fix, if possible.

# Test info

- Name: setup/auth.setup.ts >> authenticate B2B and save storage state
- Location: tests/setup/auth.setup.ts:10:6

# Test source

```ts
  1  | import { mkdirSync } from "node:fs";
  2  | import { dirname } from "node:path";
  3  | import { test as setup } from "../../src/fixtures/loginFixture";
  4  | import { URLs } from "../../src/config/urls";
  5  | 
  6  | const AUTH_STATE_PATH = "playwright/.auth/user.json";
  7  | /**
  8  |  * Runs once before B2B tests: token login → save cookies/localStorage for reuse.
  9  |  */
  10 | setup("authenticate B2B and save storage state", async ({ page, token }) => {
  11 |   mkdirSync(dirname(AUTH_STATE_PATH), { recursive: true });
  12 | 
  13 |   await page.goto(`${URLs.b2b.auth}${token}`, { waitUntil: "domcontentloaded" });
  14 | 
  15 |   await page.waitForURL((url) => !url.href.includes("/auth?token="), {
  16 |     timeout: 60_000,
  17 |   });
  18 | 
> 19 |   await page.goto(`${URLs.b2x.auth}${token}`, { waitUntil: "domcontentloaded" });
     |              ^ Error: page.goto: net::ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED at https://staging-b2x.tagaddod.com/auth?token=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzUxMiJ9..YyYFPbvkUZDBRUEDY-vBs04uRA0BgcxlUDwJ3f3QufWT_c_zgCQeqER7mvSOEvONVPkZ0VVIQGTBgAdNp-tUGQ
  20 |

  22 |     timeout: 60_000,
  23 |   });
  24 | 
  25 |   await page.context().storageState({ path: AUTH_STATE_PATH });
  26 | });
```
